injected_leakage_reason: Simulates a post-application credit bureau query result. Timestamped APPLICATION_DATE + 1-30 days. Not available at application time → temporal leakage FAIL.

findings.detail: Feature values have a large target-rate gap (0.667).
findings.recommendation: Check if this categorical feature encodes post-outcome state or business-process leakage.

findings.detail: Feature timestamp occurs after outcome timestamp for 50000 rows.
findings.recommendation: Do not use this feature unless the prediction-time workflow can prove availability before outcome.

source_reference_note: SR-12: FeatureLeakageLens on Home Credit produced 3 WARNs, 0 FAILs (SOURCE_REFERENCE — not PulseGuard-built). PulseGuard result on synthetic data with injected FAIL is shown above.
